prompt: Create a vertical printable educational worksheet in Brazilian Portuguese, clean white background, playful classroom design, centered composition, bold rounded typography, bright kid-friendly colors. At the very top, a large navy-blue headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="DOMINÓ DA MULTIPLICAÇÃO"}, with small yellow decorative rays on both sides. Below it, a purple ribbon banner with white uppercase text reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="CONECTE A CONTA AO RESULTADO!"}. Under the banner, add two centered instruction lines in black: "Recorte as peças e embaralhe. Cada jogador pega 7 peças." and "O objetivo é ficar sem peças!". The main area shows 40 domino-style tiles arranged in a 4-column by 10-row grid, evenly spaced. Each tile is a horizontal rounded rectangle with a thin colorful outline, white fill, a vertical divider at the center, and a small black dot on the divider. The left half contains either a number result or the word "INÍCIO" on the first tile, and the right half contains a multiplication expression. Use alternating border colors across the grid such as purple, green, blue, orange, pink, and yellow. The 40 tiles, in row order from left to right, top to bottom, are: 1) "INÍCIO | 1 × 1", 2) "1 | 1 × 2", 3) "2 | 1 × 3", 4) "3 | 1 × 4", 5) "4 | 1 × 5", 6) "5 | 1 × 6", 7) "6 | 1 × 7", 8) "7 | 1 × 8", 9) "8 | 1 × 9", 10) "9 | 2 × 2", 11) "4 | 2 × 3", 12) "6 | 2 × 4", 13) "8 | 2 × 5", 14) "10 | 2 × 6", 15) "12 | 2 × 7", 16) "14 | 2 × 8", 17) "16 | 2 × 9", 18) "18 | 3 × 3", 19) "9 | 3 × 4", 20) "12 | 3 × 5", 21) "15 | 3 × 6", 22) "18 | 3 × 7", 23) "21 | 3 × 8", 24) "24 | 3 × 9", 25) "27 | 4 × 4", 26) "16 | 4 × 5", 27) "20 | 4 × 6", 28) "24 | 4 × 7", 29) "28 | 4 × 8", 30) "32 | 4 × 9", 31) "36 | 5 × 5", 32) "25 | 5 × 6", 33) "30 | 5 × 7", 34) "35 | 5 × 8", 35) "40 | 5 × 9", 36) "45 | 6 × 6", 37) "36 | 6 × 7", 38) "42 | 6 × 8", 39) "48 | 6 × 9", 40) "54 | 7 × 7". At the bottom, add a large rounded dashed purple box spanning most of the width. Inside the left side of this box, place the section title "COMO JOGAR:" in bold purple uppercase, followed by 5 bullet points in black: "Coloque a peça “INÍCIO” na mesa.", "Os jogadores, na sua vez, devem encaixar uma peça cuja conta seja igual ao número da ponta livre.", "Se não tiver peça para jogar, compre do monte.", and "Vence quem ficar sem peças!". On the right side of the same box, add the title "EXEMPLO DE INÍCIO:" in purple uppercase and show 4 small domino tiles in sequence plus ellipsis: "INÍCIO | 1 × 1", then "1 | 1 × 2", then "2 | 1 × 3", then "3 | 1 × 4", followed by "...". Keep the overall style crisp, vector-like, printable, friendly for elementary math practice, with balanced spacing and highly legible text.
translatedPrompt: 创建一个垂直方向的可打印教育练习表，使用巴西葡萄牙语，背景为干净的白色，采用活泼的课堂设计，居中构图，使用粗体圆角字体，配色明亮且适合儿童。在最上方，设置一个巨大的海军蓝标题，内容为 {argument name="headline text" default="DOMINÓ DA MULTIPLICAÇÃO"}，两侧带有黄色的小型装饰光芒。下方是一个紫色丝带横幅，上面印有白色大写文字 {argument name="subtitle text" default="CONECTE A CONTA AO RESULTADO!"}。在横幅下方，添加两行居中的黑色说明文字：“Recorte as peças e embaralhe. Cada jogador pega 7 peças.” 以及 “O objetivo é ficar sem peças!”。主体区域展示 40 个多米诺骨牌风格的方块，排列成 4 列 10 行的网格，间距均匀。每个方块是一个水平圆角矩形，带有细细的彩色轮廓、白色填充、中间的垂直分隔线以及分隔线上的一个小黑点。左半部分包含数字结果或第一块骨牌上的单词“INÍCIO”，右半部分包含乘法表达式。在网格中交替使用紫色、绿色、蓝色、橙色、粉色和黄色作为边框颜色。40 个方块按从左到右、从上到下的行顺序排列为：1) "INÍCIO | 1 × 1", 2) "1 | 1 × 2", 3) "2 | 1 × 3", 4) "3 | 1 × 4", 5) "4 | 1 × 5", 6) "5 | 1 × 6", 7) "6 | 1 × 7", 8) "7 | 1 × 8", 9) "8 | 1 × 9", 10) "9 | 2 × 2", 11) "4 | 2 × 3", 12) "6 | 2 × 4", 13) "8 | 2 × 5", 14) "10 | 2 × 6", 15) "12 | 2 × 7", 16) "14 | 2 × 8", 17) "16 | 2 × 9", 18) "18 | 3 × 3", 19) "9 | 3 × 4", 20) "12 | 3 × 5", 21) "15 | 3 × 6", 22) "18 | 3 × 7", 23) "21 | 3 × 8", 24) "24 | 3 × 9", 25) "27 | 4 × 4", 26) "16 | 4 × 5", 27) "20 | 4 × 6", 28) "24 | 4 × 7", 29) "28 | 4 × 8", 30) "32 | 4 × 9", 31) "36 | 5 × 5", 32) "25 | 5 × 6", 33) "30 | 5 × 7", 34) "35 | 5 × 8", 35) "40 | 5 × 9", 36) "45 | 6 × 6", 37) "36 | 6 × 7", 38) "42 | 6 × 8", 39) "48 | 6 × 9", 40) "54 | 7 × 7"。在底部，添加一个横跨大部分宽度的巨大的紫色圆角虚线框。在此框的左侧，放置标题“COMO JOGAR:”（粗体紫色大写），后跟 5 个黑色要点：“Coloque a peça “INÍCIO” na mesa.”、“Os jogadores, na sua vez, devem encaixar uma peça cuja conta seja igual ao número da ponta livre.”、“Se não tiver peça para jogar, compre do monte.” 以及 “Vence quem ficar sem peças!”。在同一框的右侧，添加标题“EXEMPLO DE INÍCIO:”（紫色大写），并按顺序展示 4 个小型多米诺骨牌及省略号：“INÍCIO | 1 × 1”，然后是“1 | 1 × 2”，然后是“2 | 1 × 3”，然后是“3 | 1 × 4”，最后是“...”。保持整体风格清晰、矢量化、易于打印，适合小学数学练习，布局间距平衡，文字高度可读。

breakdown.creativeCore: 可打印乘法多米诺骨牌练习表：一份色彩丰富的巴西葡萄牙语课堂练习表，通过多米诺骨牌配对游戏练习乘法，非常适合教师、家庭教育及可打印数学活动使用。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求可读；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, grid, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
